title: Define Keys/Indexes Worksheet
text: Define Keys/Indexes Worksheet Use this worksheet to define the primary key used to identify occurrences of the entity, and fields that should be indexed. Note: In this release, it is only possible to define primary keys. For more information, see Keys . Tools Resource Browser—lists the field of the current entity, which you can drag and drop onto the selected key in the Key Editor. Key Editor—shows the entity, its keys, and the fields that make up each key, as a tree. You can edit properties of the selected object here or in the Properties Inspector. Properties Inspector—shows the properties of the object selected in the Key Editor, and enables you to edit them. How To Define the Keys of a Modeled Entity Resize Columns Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links Keys A key is a field or combination of fields that uniquely identifies occurrences of entities.
